items.title: Iran drone attack on Kuwait International Airport — 1 killed (Indian citizen), 63+ wounded; T1 damaged; IRGC denies, claims US interceptor failure; CENTCOM: 'deliberate, calculated, unjustified'
US House passes War Powers Resolution 215-208 — 4 Republicans defect (Barrett, Davidson, Fitzpatrick, Massie); first successful House WPR on Iran war; Senate unlikely, Trump would veto
Israel-Lebanon ceasefire renewed with 'pilot zones' — 4th Washington trilateral; LAF exclusive control; all non-state actors excluded south of Litani; next talks June 22
Araghchi: 'no progress' but 'communication not cut off' — reviewing exchanged texts, working on 'final formula'; warns Israeli attacks on Beirut could jeopardize ceasefire
Iran Navy claims targeting US destroyer command center in Gulf of Oman — CENTCOM denies: 'Iran is lying. US assets continue to operate safely'
Trump says deal possible 'this weekend' — 'I hear the negotiation itself is going very well'; claims Iran 'really wants' a deal; contradicts Iran's 'no progress' statement
Oil prices rise toward $98 — Brent $96.89 (+0.93%), 3rd straight session gains; trading range $95.76-$97.24; risk premium from stalled talks
Washington Post: Iranian attack leaves 1 dead, dozens injured at Kuwait airport
Washington Times: Iranian attack on Kuwait airport puts deadly dent into ceasefire
PBS: House passes resolution for first time to halt military action against Iran
Al Jazeera: US House passes war powers resolution in rebuke to Trump
Arab News: Israel-Lebanon pilot zones agreement at Washington talks
US News: Israel-Lebanon say they agree to ceasefire
NBC News: Iran attacks Kuwait, trades strikes with US in test to ceasefire
